hero.subtitle: We provide research, data-driven analysis, environmental planning, and climate resilience solutions for citizens, communities, institutions, and development organizations across Bangladesh.

paragraphs: GreenDelta Environmental Solutions is a research-focused environmental consultancy dedicated to working for Bangladesh's people, nature, and future resilience. We bridge the gap between rigorous scientific research and practical on-the-ground environmental action.

From the mangrove coasts of the Sundarbans to the river basins of the north and the urban heat islands of Dhaka, we study and address Bangladesh's most pressing environmental challenges with data, technology, and community engagement.

Our interdisciplinary team of environmental scientists, GIS specialists, climate researchers, and community development experts works with government agencies, NGOs, development partners, academic institutions, and local communities.

highlights.title: Research-First Approach
highlights.text: Every recommendation is grounded in peer-reviewed methodology, field data, and evidence-based analysis.

highlights.title: Bangladesh-Centered Focus
highlights.text: Deep local knowledge of Bangladesh's geography, ecology, policy landscape, and community needs.

highlights.title: Community & Citizen Engagement
highlights.text: We bring citizens, communities, and institutions together for inclusive, participatory environmental action.

highlights.title: Technology & GIS Innovation
highlights.text: Advanced GIS, satellite remote sensing, and spatial data science to deliver precision environmental insights.

services.title: Climate Change Research
services.description: In-depth research on climate variability, temperature trends, precipitation patterns, sea-level rise impacts, and adaptation strategies tailored to Bangladesh's regions.

services.title: Environmental Impact Assessment
services.description: Comprehensive EIA studies for infrastructure, industrial, and development projects — covering air, water, soil, biodiversity, and socio-environmental dimensions.

services.title: GIS & Remote Sensing Analysis
services.description: Multi-temporal satellite imagery analysis, land-use change detection, vegetation mapping, flood extent mapping, and spatial decision support systems.

services.title: Urban Environmental Planning
services.description: Green infrastructure design, urban heat island analysis, air quality assessment, urban drainage planning, and sustainable land-use recommendations for cities.

services.title: Disaster Risk & Vulnerability Assessment
services.description: Flood, cyclone, riverbank erosion, and drought risk mapping. Community vulnerability profiling and early-warning system design for disaster risk reduction.

services.title: Biodiversity & Ecosystem Studies
services.description: Flora and fauna surveys, habitat assessment, Sundarbans ecosystem health monitoring, wetland ecology, and biodiversity corridor planning.

services.title: Water, River & Wetland Research
services.description: Hydrological studies, river morphology analysis, haor and beel ecosystem research, water quality assessment, and integrated water resource management.

services.title: Community Awareness & Citizen Engagement
services.description: Environmental literacy programs, citizen science data collection, community environmental monitoring, and participatory conservation campaigns.

research.title: Climate Resilience
research.description: Studying long-term climate trends, building adaptive capacity frameworks, and designing resilience pathways for vulnerable communities across Bangladesh.

research.title: Flood & River Management
research.description: Hydrodynamic modeling, riverbank erosion analysis, floodplain mapping, and integrated flood risk management for Bangladesh's major river systems.

research.title: Coastal Vulnerability
research.description: Sea-level rise projections, cyclone risk profiling, tidal river management, mangrove dynamics, and coastal erosion assessment for the Bay of Bengal coastline.

research.title: Urban Heat & Air Quality
research.description: Urban heat island effect measurement, ambient air quality monitoring, particulate matter analysis, and green-cool city design strategies for Dhaka and other cities.

research.title: Hill Ecology & Forest Conservation
research.description: Biodiversity surveys, deforestation monitoring, forest carbon stock assessment, and conservation planning for the Chittagong Hill Tracts and Sylhet forests.

research.title: Renewable Energy & Sustainability
research.description: Solar potential mapping, wind resource assessment, energy transition planning, and sustainability indicators for low-carbon development in Bangladesh.

research.title: Citizen Science & Environmental Education
research.description: Crowd-sourced environmental data collection, community-based monitoring networks, school programs, and digital environmental awareness platforms.

projects.title: Climate Vulnerability Mapping of Coastal Bangladesh
projects.description: Multi-layered vulnerability assessment integrating sea-level rise data, cyclone frequency, livelihood profiles, and adaptive capacity indicators for 12 coastal districts.

projects.title: Urban Green Space Assessment — Dhaka Metropolitan
projects.description: NDVI-based green coverage analysis, urban heat island correlation, and green infrastructure gap mapping for Dhaka city with planning recommendations.

projects.title: Flood Risk Mapping — Brahmaputra-Jamuna Floodplain
projects.description: Hydrodynamic modelling and multi-return-period flood extent mapping to support early warning systems and community-level flood preparedness plans.

projects.title: Community Environmental Awareness Program
projects.description: Environmental literacy initiative reaching 5,000+ citizens across five districts — combining workshops, citizen science data collection, and digital content.

projects.title: River and Wetland Conservation Study — Haor Basin
projects.description: Comprehensive ecological survey of haor wetlands covering biodiversity, water quality, fish habitat, and migratory bird patterns with conservation action plan.

projects.title: Renewable Energy Potential Assessment — Northern Chars
projects.description: Solar irradiance mapping and wind speed analysis for off-grid char islands, informing clean energy deployment planning for 200,000+ isolated residents.

reasons.title: Bangladesh-Focused Research
reasons.description: Our work is rooted in deep local knowledge — from the chars of the north to the haors of the northeast and the mangrove coasts of the south. We understand Bangladesh's unique environmental context.

reasons.title: Data-Driven Environmental Solutions
reasons.description: Every finding and recommendation is backed by field surveys, satellite data, spatial analysis, and quantitative modelling — not assumptions.

reasons.title: Citizen-Centered Approach
reasons.description: We place communities at the heart of environmental work — involving citizens in research design, data collection, and awareness — ensuring solutions are inclusive and locally owned.

reasons.title: GIS & Climate Technology Expertise
reasons.description: We deploy state-of-the-art GIS, satellite remote sensing, machine learning, and climate modelling tools to generate precise, actionable environmental intelligence.

reasons.title: Sustainable & Practical Recommendations
reasons.description: Our advice is designed to be implementable — balancing scientific rigour with real-world feasibility, cultural context, and long-term sustainability.
